about.projectDescription: TARINIO is a protection and traffic control layer that intercepts incoming web Anfragen, analyzes and inspects them using WAF/CRS Regeln, applies limits and anti-DDoS measures (L4/L7), and centrally manages changes through Revisionen (compile/validate/apply/rollback), blocking attacks and unwanted traffic before it reaches the protected system.

antiddos.help.modelDecay: Controls how quickly old suspicious behavior loses score. Increase to forgive clients faster; decrease for longer memory.
antiddos.help.modelDropThreshold: Score level for hard mitigation (drop). Keep above throttle threshold to avoid premature hard Sperren.
antiddos.help.modelEmergencyPerIpRps: Per-IP Anfragen per second for single-source emergency signal. Lower for aggressive single host floods.
antiddos.help.modelEmergencyRps: Total Anfragen per second that marks emergency surge. Lower for earlier emergency reAktion.
antiddos.help.modelEmergencyUniqueIps: Unique clients per second for botnet-like emergency signal. Lower captures distributed floods faster.
antiddos.help.modelEnabled: Turns the model on or off. Keep enabled in production; disable only for isolated diagnostics.
antiddos.help.modelHoldSeconds: How long the mitigation record stays active after a trigger. Increase for persistent attacks, decrease for test environments.
antiddos.help.modelPoll: How often model reads fresh access logs. Lower value reacts faster but increases CPU usage.
antiddos.help.modelThrottleBurst: Temporary burst allowance during throttle stage. Increase if real Benutzer do short bursts and get challenged too often.
antiddos.help.modelThrottleRps: Per-IP RPS cap during throttle stage. Lower means stronger shaping for suspicious clients.
antiddos.help.modelThrottleTarget: Packet Aktion while throttling. REJECT is Benutzer-visible and friendlier; DROP is stricter and stealthier.
antiddos.help.modelThrottleThreshold: Score level to start soft mitigation (throttle). Lower value is stricter for burst traffic.
antiddos.help.modelWeight403: Score contribution per HTTP 403. Raise when blocked Anfragen should escalate faster.
antiddos.help.modelWeight429: Score contribution per HTTP 429. Raise if rate-limit bypass attempts are too frequent.
antiddos.help.modelWeight444: Score contribution per NGINX 444 Ereignisse. Usually strongest signal of malicious probing.
antiddos.help.modelWeightEmergencyBotnet: Score added to every participant during distributed emergency. Raise for faster drop escalation under botnet floods.
antiddos.help.modelWeightEmergencySingle: Score added to source IP during single-source emergency. Raise if one attacker still reaches backend under throttle.
antiddos.help.subtitle: Purpose, default value and safe tuning direction for each parameter.
antiddos.help.title: Adaptive model parameter guide
